Welcome to your personalized Swasthya Darshika report
This detailed insight; derived trom the ancient wisdom of Nadi Pariksha and
modern wellness analytics, maps your body's rhythm, highlights imbalances,
guide to nurture harmony, and empowers you with knowledge. Use it as a
vitality; and mindful living, tailored uniquely to you:
Prakruti: Pitta Kapha
blend of fire (dominant) and water/earth elements
Your constitution is Pitta Kapha, which brings together qualities of both doshas. As a
male with & normal body type; your tendencies reflect this combination-physically
mentally: You are likely to experience traits from both doshas depending on your and
lifestyle, season, and stress levels. Understanding your prakruti helps you choose
foods; routines; and habits that support balance; health; and resilience:
Vikruti: Vata
blend of air (dominant) and space elements
Your current Vata imbalance, superimposed on your Pitta Kapha Prakruti, suggests &
need for grounding and regularity: While your hydration is high and stress is medium,
the medium toxins and flexibility indicate areas needing attention to prevent Vata-
aggravation:
Rhythm Pulse Rate Remark
79 Regular Good

What is your rhythm? What does it mean? 2
Your pulse rhythm is regular; indicating good cardiovascular stability:
What is your toxin level? What does it mean? 3
Medium toxin levels suggest a moderate accumulation of metabolic waste; potentially leading to
sluggishness and reduced vitality:
Whatis your immunity level? What does it mean?
Medium immunity indicates a balanced but not robust defense system, making you susceptible to minor
ailments
What is your digestion level? What does it mean? 5.
Medium digestion signifies a moderately efficient digestive process, though it can be irregular due to Vata
imbalance
6. What is your hyperthinking level? What does it mean?
Low hyperthinking is positive; indicating a calm mind, but vigilance is needed to prevent Vata from increasing
this_
What is your stress level? What does it mean? 7.
Medium stress levels suggest you are experiencing some pressure, which if unmanaged, can impact your
overall health
What is your hydration level? What does it mean?
High hydration is excellent, supporting bodily tunctions; toxin elimination; and overall cellular health:
'flexibility level? What does it mean? 9. What is your
Medium flexibility indicates your range of motion is adequate but could be improved with targeted exercises
and therapies
